name: Survivor in the Forest
short_description: Survivor in the Forest is a 3D puzzle adventure game with clicker elements. You find yourself alone with nature and must overcome all obstacles to get out of the forest.
detailed_description:
Survivor in the Forest is a 3D puzzle adventure game with clicker elements. You find yourself alone with nature and must overcome all obstacles to get out of the forest. You have to explore the surrounding area, collect resources and find a bike to return home.

But be careful, there are many dangers and enemies in the forest that will stand in your way. You will have to use all your survival and problem-solving skills to overcome all difficulties and get out of the forest.

Can you survive in the wild? It's up to you to decide!

Game Features:
- Lots of exciting levels
- Beautiful graphics
- Pleasant music
